name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a saucepan, cook onions until softened.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper until well blended.
4. Gradually stir in milk, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
5. Arrange half of the sliced potatoes in a casserole dish.
6. Pour half of the sauce over the potatoes.
7. Layer the remaining potatoes on top, then pour the remaining sauce over the top layer.
8. Cover and bake for 45 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and continue baking uncovered for an additional 15 minutes.
